verse.name: V1
verse.lines: I wandered so aimless I'm filled with sin I wouldn't let my dear Savior in Then Jesus came Like a stranger in the night Praise the Lord I saw the light

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: I saw the light, I saw the light No more darkness, no more night Now I'm so happy, no sorrow inside Praise the Lord, I saw the light

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: Just like a blind man I wandered alone Worries and fears I cling for my own Then like a blind man That God gave back his sight Praise the Lord, I saw the light.
